case_title: PERVANCHE L MCGEE VS. STEVEN LEUNG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE IS $60.00 SERVED JAN-22-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGEE, PERVANCHE L IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,585.21 FILED BY MCGEE, PERVANCHE L AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS DEBORAH SMITH IS SWORN AND EXAMINED. PROOF OF SERVICE SUBMITTED BY THE PLAINTIFF TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
